# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Distribute Application

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - release/*
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3
    
    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v3
      with:
        node-version: '16'
        cache: 'npm'
    
    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm ci
    
    - name: Build application
      run: npm run build
    
    - name: Create artifact directory
      run: |
        mkdir -p dist/artifacts
        cp -r build/* dist/artifacts/
        cp -r config/* dist/artifacts/
        cp -r scripts/* dist/artifacts/
    
    - name: Upload build artifacts
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
      with:
        name: build-artifacts
        path: dist/artifacts/
        retention-days: 30
    
    - name: Upload compiled binaries
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
      with:
        name: compiled-binaries
        path: |
          build/binaries/*
          build/*.exe
          build/*.app
        retention-days: 30
    
    - name: Upload configuration files
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
      with:
        name: config-files
        path: config/
        retention-days: 30
    
    - name: Upload deployment scripts
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
      with:
        name: deployment-scripts
        path: scripts/deploy*
        retention-days: 30
    
  distribute:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    
    steps:
    - name: Download all artifacts
      uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
      with:
        path: dist/
    
    - name: Create distribution package
      run: |
        mkdir -p final-dist
        cp -r dist/* final-dist/
        tar -czf application-dist.tar.gz -C final-dist .
    
    - name: Upload distribution package
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
      with:
        name: application-distribution
        path: application-dist.tar.gz
        retention-days: 30
